title: Vague request — 'I need to come in soon-ish'

persona.name: Gloria Adebayo
persona.demeanor: soft-spoken, vague, gives minimal detail unless asked directly

facts.symptom: feeling tired and achy lately, not sure if it's serious
facts.intent: wants to see a doctor but won't volunteer specifics unprompted

objective: Express a vague need to be seen without providing clear details. See if the agent asks good clarifying questions or invents specifics.
probes: Does the agent ask clarifying questions (what symptoms, how long, urgency)?
Does the agent invent or assume symptoms the patient never stated?
Does the agent appropriately triage vs. over-escalate a vague complaint?
